entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the localized agronomy and fertilizer advisory solutions are being implemented.

entities.name: FERTILIZER USE
entities.description: The application of fertilizers to enhance agricultural productivity.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the productivity of agricultural land.

entities.name: BLANKET FERTILIZER RECOMMENDATIONS
entities.description: Generalized fertilizer application guidelines that do not account for local variability.

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: The earth material that varies in properties and nutrient levels across fields.

entities.name: TOPOGRAPHY
entities.description: The physical features and relief of the land surface.

entities.name: MOISTURE
entities.description: The water content of the soil affecting crop growth.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The measure of how effectively crops utilize applied nutrients.

entities.name: NUTRIENT LOSSES
entities.description: The depletion or runoff of nutrients from the soil.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in environmental quality resulting from suboptimal agricultural practices.

entities.name: ECONOMIC RETURNS
entities.description: The financial profitability derived from crop production.

entities.name: YIELD GAPS
entities.description: The difference between the potential yield and the actual yield achieved.

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The capacity of the soil to provide essential nutrients for plant growth.

entities.name: TAILORED ADVISORY SERVICES
entities.description: Context-specific agricultural guidance provided to farmers.

entities.name: FERTILIZER ADOPTION
entities.description: The uptake and use of fertilizers by farmers.

entities.name: LANDSCAPE VARIABILITY
entities.description: The variation in soil and environmental conditions across a geographic area.

entities.name: DATA-DRIVEN RECOMMENDATIONS
entities.description: Fertilizer recommendations enhanced by data and machine learning.

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A major cereal crop used for food and feed.

entities.name: TEFF
entities.description: A small-seeded cereal grass native to Ethiopia.

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A high-yielding cereal crop.

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A drought-tolerant cereal crop.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of agricultural produce harvested per unit area.

entities.name: RESOURCE-USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which inputs like fertilizer and water are utilized.

entities.name: MULTI-LOCATION TRIALS
entities.description: Agricultural experiments conducted across various sites to test consistency.

entities.name: SCALING
entities.description: The process of expanding the adoption of an innovation to a larger population.

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of organizations to maintain and update advisory services.

entities.name: INTEGRATED SCALING STRATEGY
entities.description: A comprehensive approach combining piloting, delivery channels, and policy alignment to scale innovations.
